task_completion.description: Open the original SRS document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document, with 'DataSync_SRS_v2.3.docx' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Update the version and date on the title page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title page of the document shows 'Version: 3.0' (instead of 2.3) and 'January 15, 2025' (instead of June 15, 2024).

task_completion.description: Replace all instances of 'DataSync Pro', 'DS Pro', and 'DataSync' with 'CloudBridge Enterprise'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text or a 'Find and Replace' dialog shows 'CloudBridge Enterprise' replacing the old product names.

task_completion.description: Replace all instances of 'Nextera Solutions' with 'CloudBridge Inc.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text or a 'Find and Replace' dialog shows 'CloudBridge Inc.' replacing 'Nextera Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated document as a new file without overwriting the original.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'CloudBridge_SRS_v3.0.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or a file manager window showing both the original and the new file.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a graphical word processor like LibreOffice Writer, rather than terminal commands (like sed or python scripts) doing the text replacement.

integrity.description: The agent did not accidentally replace section numbers when updating the version.
integrity.visual_evidence: Section numbers like '2.3' in the document body or table of contents should remain unchanged and not be replaced by '3.0'.

integrity.description: The original document was kept intact.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used 'Save As' instead of 'Save', and the original file 'DataSync_SRS_v2.3.docx' is still visible in the file manager alongside the new file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document is located at /home/ga/Documents/DataSync_SRS_v2.3.docx. The agent must replace 'DataSync Pro', 'DS Pro', and 'DataSync' with 'CloudBridge Enterprise', and 'Nextera Solutions' with 'CloudBridge Inc.'. On the title page, 'Version: 2.3' must become 'Version: 3.0' and 'June 15, 2024' must become 'January 15, 2025'. The final document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/CloudBridge_SRS_v3.0.docx without overwriting the original. Ensure section numbers like '2.3' are not accidentally changed to '3.0'.
